title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 54: Create Vector SVG Designs with Flux Dev & Kontext
description:
Learn how to create clean, scalable vector SVG designs in ComfyUI using Flux Dev, Flux Kontext, and the updated ComfyUI to SVG node! In this episode, we’ll walk through multiple workflows that allow you to convert sketches or AI-generated images into professional-quality SVG files. Perfect for laser cutting, engraving, t-shirt printing, stickers, and digital crafts.

You'll also learn how to:  
• Use rough sketches and AI to generate SVGs with consistent style  
• Adjust and simplify vector output for easier editing and production  
• Optimize prompts and denoise values for better results with the Flux model  
• Generate flat black vector silhouettes or experiment with color SVGs  
• Work with both standard and Nunchaku-compatible workflows  

These techniques are ideal for designers, artists, crafters, and anyone using ComfyUI for SVG production. You can download all the workflows shown in the video for free on Discord:
Step 1: use this link to join if you didn't join already https://
